recommendations.title: 12 Mighty Orphans
recommendations.overview: Haunted by his mysterious past, a devoted high school football coach leads a scrawny team of orphans to the state championship during the Great Depression and inspires a broken nation along the way.

recommendations.title: Magical Mystery Tour
recommendations.overview: While on a coach tour, The Beatles and a few dozen friends experience strange happenings caused by magicians.
recommendations.director: Ringo Starr, George Harrison, Paul McCartney, Bernard Knowles, John Lennon

recommendations.title: Champions
recommendations.overview: A disgraced basketball coach is given the chance to coach Los Amigos, a team of players who are intellectually disabled, and soon realizes they just might have what it takes to make it to the national championships.

recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.

recommendations.title: This Boy's Life
recommendations.overview: When a son and mother move to Seattle in hopes for a better life, the mother meets a seemingly polite man. Things go south when the man turns out to be abusive, endangering their lives. As the mother struggles to maintain hope in an impossible situat

recommendations.title: Celtic Pride
recommendations.overview: Two over-loyal Celtic fans kidnap their opponent's star player in order to guarantee their team the championship.

recommendations.title: Invincible
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the true story of Vince Papale, a man with nothing to lose who ignored the staggering odds and made his dream come true. When the coach of Papale's beloved hometown football team hosted an unprecedented open tryout, the public consensus w

recommendations.title: Glory Road
recommendations.overview: In 1966, Texas Western coach Don Haskins led the first all-black starting line-up for a college basketball team to the NCAA national championship.

recommendations.title: McFarland, USA
recommendations.overview: A track coach in a small California town transforms a team of athletes into championship contenders.

recommendations.title: Band Aid
recommendations.overview: A couple who can't stop fighting embark on a last-ditch effort to save their marriage: turning their fights into songs and starting a band.
